title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.250 - Duty of prosecuting attorney
text:
292.250.  Duty of prosecuting attorney. — It is hereby made the express duty of the prosecuting attorney of each county or city in this state to lend all possible aid in all prosecutions for violation of the provisions of sections 292.010 to 292.250.
(RSMo 1939 § 10204) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13244; 1919 § 6809; 1909 § 7849
